markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Randy Arozarena records 1+ stolen bases in Seattle vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Randy Arozarena is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Randy Arozarena starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Randy Arozarena is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Randy Arozarena is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Randy Arozarena: 1+ stolen bases?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tahith Chong records at least 2 goals during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Curacao vs Ivory Coast professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Curacao vs Ivory Coast professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Tahith Chong: 2+ goals
